problem id: ed24e7af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10111000 -> 00010111
  00010110 -> 00000010
  10011011 -> 10010011
  11001111 -> 10011001
  11010010 -> 00011010
  11011111 -> 10011011
  01001011 -> 10001001
  00001001 -> 10000001
  11111001 -> 10011111
  10010111 -> 10010010

query: 01001010
predicted answer: 00001001
